InventoryItem.title: Inventory Item
InventoryItem.description: A single item in the café inventory.

category.description: The category the item belongs to.

quantity.description: The current quantity (can be a mixed string like '1 & 3/4').

lowStockThreshold.description: The threshold at which the item is considered low stock.

uid.description: The ID of the user who last updated or created the item.

isCounted.description: Whether the item has been counted by staff.

emoji.description: The emoji icon for the item.
